compiled_state.title: test-gate-status is a single file overwritten by each record-test-status.sh call
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Multi-file commits fail the test gate because each record-test-status.sh call overwrites the single test-gate-status file. The pre-commit gate checks ALL staged source files but only finds the LAST recorded test. Observed during w22-jucp batch 4 (4 source files in one commit). Fix: per-source-file status entries.

comments.body: INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: safeguard_approval | Behavioral code bug: test-gate-status single file overwrite. Fix requires editing plugins/dso/scripts/record-test-status.sh (safeguard). Re-run in interactive session to approve.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). Cluster with 8a96-6f70 (same file: record-test-status.sh)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Investigation RESULT: ROOT_CAUSE: record-test-status.sh writes test-gate-status with cat > (destructive overwrite). When --source-file is used per-file, each call overwrites previous results. Pre-commit gate then finds missing tested_files. CONFIDENCE: high. FIX: Make --source-file calls accumulative (merge tested_files with existing status file).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
